title: Create Christmas Bow and Ribbon Set, Metallic Gold
availability_text: Only 9 left in stock (more on the way).
features: CRAFT There is nothing better than the build up to the most wonderful time of the year. Combine with a cellophane wrap to create the ultimate Christmas hamper basket, or attach to a gift bag or personal present for a sentimental touch.

CONTENTS Pack includes 16 pieces of gift tags, a variety of bows, assorted ribbons, and curling ribbons, the essential set of supplies for gift wrapping. Perfect for creating a hamper, festive basket, gift bag and many more!

PERSONALISE No wrapped gift is complete without a tag for your personal message, decorate gifts with the festive assortment of ribbons and bows.Make your own handmade card and show off your gift wrapping with this Christmas Set!

EMBELLISH Enhance your gift wrapping skills with our Create Christmas Metallic Gold Gift Bow Kit. This all-inclusive kit is perfect for DIY enthusiasts, suitable for Christmas, Birthdays, Wedding, a Baby Shower and many more occasions

BRAND The Create Christmas brand was designed with the festive season in mind. It is a best-selling range of everything you could need for seasonal crafting. Offer fantastic value and amazing quality for your gift wrapping and craft requirements
description: Designed to bring joy to crafters over the festive season, Create Christmas is the go-to range for seasonal crafting and gifting. With an exciting festive assortment of velvet, cotton and satin ribbons, crafters can get into the Christmas spirit by decorating gifts or embellishing cards for friends and family! And don’t forget their stash of buttons, charms, pom poms, stickers, jingle bells, wooden shapes and polystyrene bases! The Create Christmas range helps crafters do exactly that - create a truly beautiful Christmas.
